source: Source-trace inspection of localized .strings resources on 2026-05-18 plus a validated multisurface-harness dry-run plan. No screenshot captures are committed under this directory.
gate_result_reason: No preserved screenshot evidence for any of the 4 CJK locales. Source-trace surfaced 1 major HIG risk (HIG-JA-001 for Japanese Train tab katakana label width). Korean, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese have no source-level HIG findings (compact 2-char tab labels are ideal for tab-bar use) but cannot pass without preserved screenshots for the scoped surfaces. Internal-reviewer signoff is recorded for all 4 locales.

signoff_baseline.scope: Permits HIG bucket-gate slices to run against the current LLM-drafted text. Does NOT claim native review, fluent review, translation quality, or screenshot/device/TestFlight proof.

harness_plan.dry_run_status: planned (28 captures = 4 locales x 7 surfaces; idb + idb_companion ready)

label_overrides_needed.today: All four CJK today labels are in the harness default catalog (ja '今日', ko '오늘', zh-Hans/zh-Hant '今天'); no overrides required for the today surface.

harness_plan.actual_capture_status: not run in this slice. Capture is deferred to a separate follow-up screenshot-capture slice.

ja.notes: Japanese is the CJK outlier on tab-label width because of katakana loanwords: 'トレーニング' (6 chars), 'キャリア' (4 chars), 'ホーム' (3 chars), 'キャンセル' (5 chars). Each katakana char renders roughly equivalent to one CJK ideograph in width. See HIG-JA-001 for the Train tab risk. Translation-quality note (NOT a HIG defect): a native reviewer could swap the loanwords for kanji alternatives (e.g., '訓練' for Train) if the native-review pass prefers them; the choice is reviewer-led.

ko.notes: Korean tab labels are uniformly 1-2 Hangul characters — ideal for tab-bar use. No source-trace HIG risk identified. Translation-quality note (NOT a HIG defect): '쓰기' for Write is the noun form (the act of writing); '작성' is an alternative.

zh-Hans.notes: Simplified Chinese tab labels are uniformly 1-2 simplified ideographs — ideal for tab-bar use. Career '事业' uses simplified forms that differ from Traditional Chinese '事業'. No source-trace HIG risk identified.

zh-Hant.notes: Traditional Chinese tab labels are uniformly 1-2 traditional ideographs — ideal for tab-bar use. Differs from Simplified Chinese as expected (e.g., '訓練' vs '训练', '事業' vs '事业', '儲存' vs '保存'). No source-trace HIG risk identified.

open_findings.summary: Japanese Train tab label 'トレーニング' (6 katakana characters) is significantly wider than typical CJK 2-character tab labels and wider than the English 'Train' (5 Latin chars; CJK glyphs render roughly 2x Latin width per character, so 6 katakana ~= 12 Latin chars equivalent). Tab-bar truncation likely on smaller iPhone widths and at larger Dynamic Type settings.
observed_evidence: Comparison across CJK bucket: ja 'トレーニング'=6ch, ko '훈련'=2ch, zh-Hans '训练'=2ch, zh-Hant '訓練'=2ch.
open_findings.proof_path_or_chat_observation: Source-trace inspection only. No Japanese Train tab screenshot is preserved.
remediation_options: Capture Japanese Train tab screenshots on iPhone SE / standard iPhone portrait and confirm whether the label truncates or shrinks legibly.
If truncation is confirmed, native reviewer could swap to kanji alternative '訓練' (2 chars) which would also align with the other CJK locales' lengths.
Alternatively, address with a tab-bar UI tweak alongside HIG-DE-002/FR-001/NL-001/RU-001/TR-001/UK-001.
open_findings.screenshot_inspection_note: Captured Today screenshot at the proof path shows iOS auto-shrinks the long tab label to fit at iPhone 17 portrait default Dynamic Type. Literal truncation does not occur here. Severity downgraded from major to minor. Remaining risk: smaller iPhone widths, larger Dynamic Type, and VoiceOver users seeing the smaller text.

missing_evidence_for_pass: Build Info screenshot per locale with complete gate fields (version, build, commit short/full, branch, source-clean flags)
Today screenshot per locale with no visible app-owned English strings
All five root tabs per locale (especially Japanese Train tab for HIG-JA-001 confirmation)
Primary empty states per locale (Today/Train/Write/Career/Home/Patterns/Settings empty-state copy)
Primary actions per locale (Save, Cancel, Continue, primary CTAs)
High-risk date/count/plural surfaces per locale (CJK typography sensitive to character density)
Dynamic Type pass (standard text size + Larger Accessibility Text)
Accessibility labels/hints/values for the reviewed surfaces
not_claimed: any of these 4 CJK locales is hig-ui-reviewed
any of these 4 CJK locales is native-reviewed
translation quality for any of these 4 CJK locales (Japanese loanword choices, Korean noun-vs-verb forms, Simplified vs Traditional differences all need native review)
screenshot-reviewed, device-verified, or testflight-verified for any of these 4 CJK locales
downstream_recommendations: Run automation/smoke/capture_localized_surfaces.py --capture --locales ja ko zh-Hans zh-Hant --surfaces today root-tab-train root-tab-write root-tab-career root-tab-home build-info date-count-plural-today. No --label-overrides needed for today; all 4 CJK today labels are in the default catalog.
After capture, append findings to this gate and update the all-locale HIG evidence matrix per_locale_state for these 4 locales.
HIG-JA-001 shares a fix shape with HIG-FR-001 + HIG-DE-002/NL-001/RU-001/TR-001/UK-001 (tab-bar truncation). After screenshot confirmation, the same single tab-bar UI-tweak slice can address it.

changes: Downgraded HIG-JA-001 severity from major to minor based on Japanese Today screenshot inspection.
iOS auto-shrinks 'トレーニング' to fit at iPhone 17 portrait default Dynamic Type; no literal truncation.
